name: Locasystem International SA
summary: Locasystem International SA engages in the rental of computing and office equipment in France. The company rents systems, microcomputing equipment, photocopiers, telecopiers, workstations and graphical workstations, terminals, networks, etc. It also sells equipment; and offers services, including auditing and management of computing installations, maintenance, upgrades, etc. The company is based in Paris, France.
